# Obligatory AI Generation Comment Guideline

Use this rule for all newly created files and classes.

## Required comment text

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Steps

1. Add the required text near the top of every new file.
2. Add the required text in or directly above every new class definition.
3. Keep the text exact.
